data.title: Tether Freezes Over $11 Million USDT Amid Phishing Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether has frozen $11 million USDT linked to a TRON address, THsPNvWc47swNQp2GmAoH96KtYfSR4bz9F, due to suspected phishing activities. Additionally, a UniswapV2Pair contract address (0x652d…89E) has also been frozen, involving 442,400 USDT.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF in the U.S. Sees Significant Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported a net outflow of $73.6 million from the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF yesterday.

data.title: ETH's early whale recharged 16,400 ETH to HTX, or made a profit of 13.1 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, an ETH whale recharged 16,467 ETH (worth approximately $30.33 million) to HTX 8 hours ago after holding it for 4.25 years. The whale purchased 9,298 ETH from Binance, HTX, and Bitstamp on December 9, 2020 (at a cost of approximately $560), and 7,116 ETH from Coinbase on March 16, 2023 (at a cost of approximately $1,658). If the whale sells all ETH at $1,842, it is expected to make a profit of $13.1 million (+76%).

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$73.6289 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 7 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 13, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$73.6289 million.
Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of US$41.6985 million, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is US$4.174 billion.
Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net outflow of US$5.2318 million, and the current total historical net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is US$601 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was VanEck ETF ETHV, with a single-day net inflow of US$1.3537 million, and the current total historical net inflow of ETHV reached US$138 million.

As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is US$6.493 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.92%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.556 billion.
Information source: https://sosovalue.com/assets/etf/us-eth-spot

data.title: Bitget's flash exchange function has been upgraded to comprehensively improve the accuracy of quotes and transaction limits
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget's flash exchange function has been newly upgraded. This optimization further improves the accuracy of quotes and significantly increases the single transaction limit. After the upgrade, the flash exchange transaction range of conventional currency pairs is adjusted to 2 USDT - 50,000 USDT, and the maximum single exchange of mainstream currency pairs such as BTC and ETH is 300,000 USDT, providing users with a more flexible and efficient trading experience. Please update to the latest version to experience the optimized functions.

data.title: ETH whale suspected to sell 2,400 ETH 3 hours ago, if sold, it would lose $2.005 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, ETH whale 0x59A...D472B sold 2,400 ETH (US$4.47 million) 3 hours ago, and would lose US$2.005 million if sold.
This part of ETH was built during the downward trend of the coin price in February and March this year, with a cost of $2,697. The recharge price this time was $1,862, and the position shrunk by nearly 31%.
Wallet address https://intel.arkm.com/explorer/address/0x59AC747c9b5E7C575D64ba0275F98Dad03DD472B

data.title: ETH Whale Potentially Sells at a Loss Amid Market Downturn
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analyst @ai_9684xtpa has reported that an Ethereum whale, identified by the wallet address 0x59A...D472B, may have sold 2,400 ETH, valued at approximately $4.47 million, three hours ago. This transaction could result in a loss of $2.005 million for the whale. The ETH in question was acquired during a market downturn between February and March of this year, with a purchase price of $2,697 per ETH. The current sale price is $1,862 per ETH, indicating a position reduction of nearly 31%.

data.title: aiPool founder: Two full-time staff are redesigning a custom AMM
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News aiPool founder skely posted on X: "I'm not a good 'developer', I'm not good at writing, and I'm not even a particularly good 'marketer'. What I'm really good at is discovering talented people. So if someone is worried about other projects. Don't worry, they are building their stuff @aipool_tee has 1-2 full-time developers, we are redesigning a custom AMM to stop grabbers, and our pre-sale activities will resume soon! @elizaOS has Shaw developing it, working 12 hours a day, and the whole team is working non-stop. The best thing I can do is to keep creating. If you don't like what I make, it's completely fair, please don't invest or buy it."

data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged whale made over $16 million in profit in the past month
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid has made a profit of $16.39 million in the past month. 6 hours ago, the whale again went long on ETH and HYPE on Hyperliquid and made another profit of $1.18 million.
In the past month, the whale made a total of 8 transactions on Hyperliquid through 2 wallets, all of which were profitable, with a cumulative profit of $16.39 million.

data.title: pump.fun app adds chat feature
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News pump.fun posted on the X platform that its mobile application has added a chat function, allowing users to send private messages, create group chats, and seamlessly share token specific information.
